plugins.name: Sample Launcher Plugin
plugins.description: Demonstrates launcher rows, child items, commands, BTT variables, named triggers, and a native launcher surface.

plugins.name: Quick Links
plugins.description: Creates saved launcher items that open reusable URL templates and demonstrates plugin-managed instances.

plugins.name: Clipboard Change
plugins.description: Fires a BetterTouchTool trigger when the system clipboard changes.

plugins.name: File Watcher
plugins.description: Watches a configured file or folder and fires a BetterTouchTool trigger when it changes.

plugins.name: 1Password Launcher Example
plugins.description: Searches and opens 1Password items through the op CLI.

plugins.name: Google Search Launcher
plugins.description: Opens the current launcher query as a Google search in the default browser.

plugins.name: Caffeinate
plugins.description: Toggles a background caffeinate process to keep the Mac awake.

plugins.name: Launcher FallingBlocks2
plugins.description: Demonstrates a SwiftUI falling-blocks game hosted inside a launcher surface.

plugins.name: Launcher Pong
plugins.description: Demonstrates an interactive Pong game hosted inside a launcher surface.

plugins.name: Compress Finder Selection
plugins.description: Creates zip archives from the current Finder selection.

plugins.name: Finder Convert Selected Image to JPEG
plugins.description: Converts the currently selected Finder image to JPEG.

plugins.name: Analog Clock
plugins.description: Shows a smooth native analog clock as a floating menu widget.

plugins.name: Copy Path / URL
plugins.description: Copies the front app's document path or the active browser tab's URL.

plugins.name: Cursor Launcher
plugins.description: Quick-open recent Cursor workspaces.

plugins.name: GitHub PR Monitor
plugins.description: Lists open pull requests and review requests for a configured GitHub repository.

plugins.name: Jira Issues
plugins.description: Browse issues assigned to, reported by, or watched by you, or run custom JQL.

plugins.name: Kill Process
plugins.description: Browse running processes and force-kill or gracefully terminate them.

plugins.name: News Search
plugins.description: Search Google News from the launcher with a rich preview surface.

plugins.name: Quick Links
plugins.description: Save reusable URL or filesystem-path templates and open them with the right app.

plugins.name: QuickTime Recording
plugins.description: Start QuickTime screen, audio, or movie recordings from the launcher.

plugins.name: Stock Prices
plugins.description: Look up stock quotes and manage a watchlist with sparkline details.

plugins.name: Code Launcher
plugins.description: Quick-open recent Visual Studio Code workspaces.

plugins.name: Xcode Recent Projects
plugins.description: Search and open recently used Xcode projects and workspaces.
